HOME.DANHGIA: Phiet Hoc made my trip incredibly comfortable. The booking process was easy, the bus was clean and on time. Highly recommended!

FOOTER.KET: Booking bus tickets is easy with PhietHoc!From humble beginnings, the company has risen to become one of the leading names in passenger transportation, constantly improving the quality of its service. In particular, PhietHoc's fleet of comfortable 11-seater Limousine buses is committed to providing passengers with the most unique and convenient experience on every route.

ABOUT.ABOUT_2: Learn About Phiet Hoc Bus Company
ABOUT.ABOUT_3: Phiệt Học – a long-standing and renowned bus company operating on the interprovincial route connecting Hanoi to Thai Binh. From humble beginnings, the company has risen to become one of the leading names in passenger transport, constantly improving its service quality. In particular, Phiệt Học's fleet of comfortable 11-seater Limousine buses is committed to providing passengers with the most unique and convenient experience on every journey.
ABOUT.ABOUT_4: Founded with the mission of elevating the limousine travel experience, Phiệt Học continuously strives to become a reliable companion on every journey. We provide transparent information, competitive fares, and many attractive promotional programs for our customers. Phiệt Học believes that every trip is a memorable experience, and we are always ready to support you every step of the way.
ABOUT.ABOUT_5: Why You Should Book Your Bus Ticket with Phiet Hoc
ABOUT.ABOUT_6: When booking tickets through Phiệt Học bus company, you will enjoy a simple booking process, flexible payment options, and instant e-tickets. We cooperate with many quality bus companies, ensuring safety and convenience for every trip. Phiệt Học's customer service team is always ready to assist you 24/7, giving you peace of mind on every journey.

FAQS.FAQ_2: Below are some frequently asked questions about Phiệt Học bus company. If you need more information, please contact us.
FAQS.FAQ_3: Can I cancel or change my booked tickets?
FAQS.FAQ_4: You can cancel or change your ticket within the permitted timeframe. Please refer to our cancellation policy for details.
FAQS.FAQ_5: How do I contact customer support?
FAQS.FAQ_6: You can contact customer support via email, phone, or the contact form on the website.
FAQS.FAQ_8: Phiệt Học is a long-standing and well-known bus company operating on the inter-provincial route connecting Hanoi to Thai Binh.
FAQS.FAQ_9: How do I book a bus ticket?
FAQS.FAQ_10: To book your ticket, simply visit our website, select your desired route, and complete the payment.
FAQS.FAQ_12: We have a mobile app for both Android and iOS devices to make it easy for you to book and manage your tickets.
FAQS.FAQ_14: We accept various payment methods such as credit cards, e-wallets, and bank transfers.

BLOG.TITLE: Blog
BLOG.INTRODUCTION: From clearly defining your travel goals to estimating your costs and needs, Phiet Hoc offers a seamless travel experience with numerous benefits.
BLOG.POST1_TITLE: Why Choose ViserBus? Benefits of Booking With Us
BLOG.POST1_CONTENT: We'll guide you step-by-step to plan a trip that suits your personal needs. Whether you're new to booking bus tickets or already familiar with the process, this article will help you make the right and more proactive decision...
BLOG.POSTT: Planning a trip isn't just about booking tickets; it also requires careful preparation in terms of finances and itinerary. We'll share important factors such as costs, choosing the right time slots and transportation options to ensure you have a safe and economical trip.
BLOG.POST2_TITLE: 10 Tips for a Comfortable Bus Trip: A Worry-Free Journey
BLOG.POST2_CONTENT: Prepare for a comfortable trip with these useful tips...
BLOG.POST3_TITLE: How to Book Bus Tickets Online: Step by Step Guide for Beginners
BLOG.POST3_CONTENT: Step by step guide to booking bus tickets online easily...
BLOG.POST4_TITLE: Discover the Benefits of Online Bus Ticket Booking
BLOG.POST4_CONTENT: Online bus ticket booking saves you time and money...
BLOG.POST5_TITLE: The Future of Bus Travel: Innovation and Technology Trends
BLOG.POST5_CONTENT: A look at the future of bus travel with modern technology...
BLOG.POST6_TITLE: How to Choose the Right Bus Service: A Complete Guide
BLOG.POST6_CONTENT: Criteria to help you choose the best quality bus service...
BLOG.POST7_TITLE: Bus Travel Etiquette Guide: Do's and Don'ts
BLOG.POST7_CONTENT: Be a courteous passenger with these etiquette tips...
BLOG.POST8_TITLE: Exploring Beautiful Routes: Amazing Bus Journeys
BLOG.POST8_CONTENT: The most beautiful bus routes in Vietnam you should experience...
BLOG.POST1_INTRO: From setting clear travel goals to estimating costs and your needs, ViserBus brings a seamless travel experience with many benefits.
BLOG.POST1_QUOTE: Planning a trip is not just about booking tickets but also about careful financial and schedule preparation. We will share important factors such as costs, choosing the right time and bus to travel safely and economically.
BLOG.POST1_PLAN: We will guide you step by step to plan a trip that suits your personal needs. Whether you are new or experienced with bus booking, this article will help you make informed decisions.
BLOG.POST1_DETAIL_TITLE: From setting travel goals to estimating costs and needs
BLOG.POST1_DETAIL: We will accompany you in building the most suitable travel plan. Whether traveling alone or with family, this article will provide useful information for your ideal trip.
BLOG.POST2_INTRO: 10 tips to make your bus trip comfortable and enjoyable. From packing light to choosing the right seat, every small tip contributes to a smooth journey.
BLOG.POST2_QUOTE: Don't forget to bring water, snacks and personal essentials. Maintaining a positive attitude and being polite to everyone around also makes the trip more enjoyable.
BLOG.POST2_PLAN: Check the schedule, book tickets early and arrive at the station on time to avoid unnecessary troubles. Let ViserBus accompany you on every road.
BLOG.POST2_DETAIL_TITLE: Enjoy every moment on the bus
BLOG.POST2_DETAIL: Relax, listen to music or read a book to make the trip more interesting. Don't forget to save memorable experiences with friends and family.
BLOG.POST3_INTRO: A detailed step-by-step guide to help first-time users book bus tickets online easily and quickly.
BLOG.POST3_QUOTE: Online booking saves you time and effort, no need to queue at the bus station. Just a few simple steps on your phone and you have your ticket.
BLOG.POST3_PLAN: First, visit the website and select your desired route. Then choose your departure date and suitable seat. Finally, fill in your information and make payment.
BLOG.POST3_DETAIL_TITLE: Receive e-ticket and hit the road
BLOG.POST3_DETAIL: After successful payment, an e-ticket will be sent to your email. Save the ticket code for tracking and present it when boarding.
BLOG.POST4_INTRO: Online bus ticket booking helps you save time, compare prices easily and avoid queuing at bus stations.
BLOG.POST4_QUOTE: With modern technology, booking tickets has never been easier. With just a smartphone, you can book tickets anytime, anywhere.
BLOG.POST4_PLAN: You can book tickets anytime, anywhere with just a phone or computer. The system will display all available trips for you to choose from.
BLOG.POST4_DETAIL: Additionally, online booking helps you receive many attractive promotions and offers not available at the counter.
BLOG.POST5_INTRO: Technology is transforming the bus transportation industry with many innovations from booking systems to on-board experiences.
BLOG.POST5_QUOTE: Smart buses with high-speed wifi, USB charging ports and personal entertainment systems are gradually becoming the new standard.
BLOG.POST5_PLAN: Smart buses with wifi, USB charging ports, and personal entertainment screens are becoming the new standard in the transportation industry.
BLOG.POST5_DETAIL_TITLE: Electric and self-driving buses in the future
BLOG.POST5_DETAIL: In the future, electric and self-driving buses will help reduce operating costs and better protect the environment.
BLOG.POST6_INTRO: Important criteria to help you choose the best quality bus service that suits your needs.
BLOG.POST6_QUOTE: A good bus company doesn't just take you to your destination but also provides a comfortable, safe experience throughout the journey.
BLOG.POST6_PLAN: Consider factors such as bus company reputation, customer reviews, on-board amenities, ticket prices and schedules.
BLOG.POST6_DETAIL: Additionally, check cancellation policies, refund policies and customer service before making a decision.
BLOG.POST7_INTRO: Be a civilized and polite passenger on every bus trip with these simple etiquette rules.
BLOG.POST7_QUOTE: Mutual respect between passengers creates a comfortable and friendly atmosphere for everyone.
BLOG.POST7_PLAN: Not talking too loudly, maintaining general hygiene, and respecting nearby passengers' privacy are basic courtesies.
BLOG.POST7_DETAIL_TITLE: Creating a comfortable environment for everyone
BLOG.POST7_DETAIL: Good etiquette not only creates a comfortable environment for yourself but also for all passengers on the bus.
BLOG.POST8_INTRO: Vietnam has many beautiful bus routes passing through mountains, seas and peaceful countryside.
BLOG.POST8_QUOTE: Each route brings unique experiences, from majestic mountains to vast blue seas.
BLOG.POST8_PLAN: Hanoi - Sapa, Da Nang - Hue, Nha Trang - Da Lat are the most popular routes with wonderful natural scenery.
BLOG.POST8_DETAIL_TITLE: Enjoy scenery from the bus window
BLOG.POST8_DETAIL: Choose a window seat to fully enjoy the magnificent natural scenery on every trip.

AUTH.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 10 characters.

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.DESC: Your privacy is important to us. This privacy policy explains how ViserBus collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
PRIVACY.INFO_COLLECT_DESC: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, email, phone number, and payment details when you book tickets.
PRIVACY.HOW_USE_DESC: We use your information to process bookings, send confirmations, provide customer support, and improve our services.
PRIVACY.DATA_SECURITY_DESC: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.

TERMS.TERM_2: By accessing or using the Bus Ticket Booking website, you agree to abide by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.
TERMS.TERM_4: The website provides an online platform for users to search, book, and purchase bus tickets. We act as an intermediary between users and bus companies.
TERMS.TERM_6: You are responsible for providing accurate information when booking tickets. Do not use the website for fraudulent or illegal activities.
TERMS.TERM_8: All bookings are subject to seat availability and confirmation from the bus company. Payment must be made in full when booking tickets. Please carefully check the information before confirming your ticket purchase.
TERMS.TERM_10: Cancellation and refund policies are determined by each bus company. Please refer to the specific policy when booking tickets. We are not responsible for changes or cancellations made by the bus company
TERMS.TERM_12: All content and materials on the website, including logos, text, images, and software, are the property of Dat Ve Xe or its partners. Content may not be used or copied without permission.
TERMS.TERM_14: We reserve the right to update or change the Terms of Service at any time. Changes are effective immediately upon posting on the website. Continued use of the website signifies your acceptance of the new terms.
TERMS.TERM_16: The use of the website is also subject to our Privacy Policy. Please refer to the Privacy Policy to understand how we handle personal information.

TICKET.TICKET_2: All bookings are subject to seat availability and confirmation from the bus company. Please provide accurate information when booking. Incorrect information may lead to booking failure or problems when boarding.
TICKET.TICKET_4: Full payment is required when booking. Accepted payment methods are listed on the website. Bookings are only confirmed after successful payment.
TICKET.TICKET_6: Cancellation and refund policies vary depending on the bus company. Please carefully check the specific terms when booking. We are not responsible for changes or cancellations made by the bus company.
TICKET.TICKET_8: Changing booking information (date, time, passenger information) depends on the bus company's policy. Please contact customer support or the bus company for assistance.
TICKET.TICKET_10: Please be at the departure point at least 30 minutes before departure time.
TICKET.TICKET_12: The carrier is responsible for providing transportation services as described in the booking. We are not responsible for delays, cancellations, or changes to services made by the carrier.
TICKET.TICKET_14: We may update the ticket policy at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon being posted on the website.

REFUND.REFUND_2: Refund policies apply to cases where customers cancel tickets in accordance with the regulations of each bus company. Please carefully check the refund terms when booking your ticket.
REFUND.REFUND_4: We collect and use your personal data to process refunds and support customers. Data is secure and used only for purposes related to refund transactions.
REFUND.REFUND_6: We use cookies to improve the user experience and support the refund process. Cookies help remember transaction information and assist with verification when necessary.
REFUND.REFUND_8: Personal data related to refunds will be stored for the time necessary to process the transaction and comply with legal regulations.

PAYMENT.TITLE: Payment
PAYMENT.SCAN_QR: Scan QR code to complete payment
PAYMENT.CONFIRM_MSG: Payment confirmed! Your ticket has been sent to your email.
PAYMENT.CANCEL_MSG: Are you sure you want to cancel?
